name: The Snack That Was a Wire
text:
The Snack That Was a Wire is also the table snack. Give it to the opponent on your right; they may eat it.
While an opponent has eaten The Snack That Was a Wire, you may look at their hand at any time. (They were bugged. The pretzel was listening the whole time.) Whenever you look this way, you may sacrifice a Favor token to make them discard a card you saw.
The goblins put a microphone in a soft pretzel. It is, somehow, still crunchy.
flavorText: "Was the pretzel always this salty?" "That's not salt. Keep talking."

extras.tableState: the table snack as a literal wire
